caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio against a backdrop of gray acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt, with tattoos visible on his right arm. A professional microphone, labeled "rode NT1-A", is positioned on a boom arm in front of him. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing; in the first frame, he looks slightly to the left with his mouth partially open and his left hand raised in a blur of motion. As the clip progresses, he continues to speak, shifting his gaze and adjusting his facial expression. By the final frame, he has settled into a steady gaze toward the left while continuing to talk, with his hand no longer visible in the frame.
